rationale: Wiener output at KAPPA=100 has residual ringing artifacts. Blending 10% of the blurred input back suppresses ringing while retaining 90% of the deblurring effect. Grid scan confirmed alpha=0.9 as optimal (+0.83 dB vs +0.39 dB for Gaussian, +0.30 dB for bilateral). Gaussian post-filter and plain KAPPA tuning both fall below the 0.5 dB threshold.
rationale_verdict: psnr_oracle improved +0.83 dB (29.82 -> 30.65), exceeding min_delta=0.5. Both oracle and blind PSNR improved. 13/13 tests pass.
